Client tracker preview for Down to Earth Dogs

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Down to Earth Dogs: A reservation-first tracker for Emily's weekday daycare + overnight boarding — meet-and-greets, trial runs, and Rabies/DHPP records in one place instead of separate emails and call-backs.

Reservation first Trial day / meet-and-greet Vaccine tracking Holiday waitlist
Start the $99 setup See what is included

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Dogs must come for an initial meet and greet as well as a trial run prior to their first overnight stay, All dogs must be in good health and up to date on Rabies and DHPP vaccinations, A 25% non refundable deposit is required at the time of booking for all reservations, 7 days for all non-holiday reservations — 14 days for any holiday reservation

Today at Down to Earth Dogs Reservation board Nala R. Record Reservation + Meet-and-Greet View Stay Timing + Holiday Window Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • One board moves each dog from meet-and-greet through trial run, vaccine check, deposit, and confirmed stay — no more re-reading email threads at drop-off.
  • Rabies + DHPP (and flea/tick / spay-neuter status) tracked per dog with expiration flags before the 7-day or 14-day booking window closes.
  • Holiday waitlist replaces the informal list: requested dates, vaccine readiness, deposit status, and repeat-client priority all visible on one timeline.

1. Today at Down to Earth Dogs

Today at Down to Earth Dogs

Dogs on property, daycare and overnight drop-offs, today's meet-and-greet, trial-run pickups, and vaccine flags — one snapshot replacing scattered texts and the inbox.

Open this view

2. Reservation board

Reservation board

Every dog moves left-to-right: Inquiry → Meet-and-greet → Trial run → Rabies + DHPP check → Confirmed → On property → Pickup recap. The 'initial meet and greet as well as a trial run' sequence stops living in separate threads.

Open this view

3. Nala R. Record

Nala R. Record

Per-dog page: breed, owner, feeding, special-care notes, vaccines, meet-and-greet + trial-run results, emergency contact — what Emily used to rebuild from email each time.

Open this view

4. Reservation + Meet-and-Greet View

Reservation + Meet-and-Greet View

Confirm a stay in one screen: meet-and-greet + trial-run cleared, Rabies/DHPP currency, flea/tick + spay/neuter status, 7-day or 14-day booking rule met, 25% deposit received.

Open this view

5. Stay Timing + Holiday Window

Stay Timing + Holiday Window

This week's drop-offs and pickups, the July 4 holiday waitlist with vaccine-readiness and deposit status, and blackout lanes (Sundays, lobby-closed, personal days).

Open this view

6. Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

Pickup Recap + Repeat-Booking View

After each stay: recap with photos, flagged behavior notes (group-play fit, guarding), and a prompt to offer the next booking window — so repeat owners skip the trial-run restart.

Open this view

7. Setup Map

Setup Map

Six-step setup: duplicate the template, import dog records, wire Rabies/DHPP expiration flags, turn on the public inquiry form, set the 7/14-day booking-window rules, and mark your blackout lanes.

Open this view
